info.name: FaceDedup API
info.description:
FaceDedup is a facial recognition and deduplication API built on InsightFace with multi-layered anti-spoof protection.

Anti-Spoof Pipeline:
- 7 mandatory heuristic checks (detection confidence, landmark quality, skin tone, DCT frequency, glare, LBP texture, edge density)
- 8 optional heuristic checks with tolerance of 3 (ML anti-spoof, noise pattern, color correlation, sharpness, color distribution, face size, embedding norm, gradient smoothness for AI detection)
- Multi-frame active liveness (3-5 sequential images with 5 inter-frame motion checks)

When liveness fails, the response includes a detailed breakdown of every check (failed_checks and passed_checks) so you can see exactly what failed and why.

Authentication is via the X-API-Key header on all endpoints except /health.

Base URL: https://face.ninauth.com. All endpoints are prefixed with /api/v1.

request.description: Check the health status of the API, database, Redis, and face model. No authentication required.

item.name: Enroll

formdata.description: Skip liveness check (admin override). Default: false

request.description:
Enroll a new face record with single-frame liveness validation.

Runs 15 liveness checks:
- 7 mandatory heuristic checks (detection confidence, landmark quality, skin tone, DCT frequency, glare, LBP texture, edge density)
- 8 optional with tolerance of 3 (ML anti-spoof, noise pattern, color correlation, sharpness, color distribution, face size, embedding norm, gradient smoothness)

Rejects: cartoons, AI-generated faces, printed photos, screen replays.
On failure, response includes detailed check-by-check breakdown.
Use skip_liveness=true to bypass for testing.

response.name: Liveness Check Failed

request.description:
Enroll with multi-frame active liveness. Provide the primary image + 2-4 additional frames (3-5 total). Runs per-frame passive checks + 5 inter-frame active checks (identity consistency, landmark displacement, head pose variation, optical flow, bounding box shift).

Strongest anti-spoof protection — static images cannot produce genuine inter-frame motion.

response.name: Enrolled with Multi-Frame Liveness

item.description: Enroll face records into the database. Supports single-frame and multi-frame liveness.

item.name: Match

query.description: Minimum similarity threshold (0-1). Uses server default if omitted.
Skip liveness check on query image (admin override). Default: false

request.description:
Match a face image against all enrolled records. Runs ML anti-spoof + heuristic liveness checks on the query image before matching. Returns a ranked list of matching records with similarity scores.

Rejects cartoons, AI images, printed photos, and screen replays.

item.description: Match faces against enrolled records with liveness gate.

item.name: Compare

query.description: Similarity threshold to determine a match (0-1). Uses server default if omitted.
Skip liveness check on both images (admin override). Default: false

request.description:
Compare two face images directly and return similarity score. Runs ML anti-spoof + liveness checks on BOTH images before comparing. No database lookup.

Rejects cartoons, AI images, printed photos, and screen replays.

item.description: Compare two face images directly with liveness gates on both.

item.name: Liveness

formdata.description: Face image to check for liveness

request.description:
Single-frame passive liveness detection with ML anti-spoof.

Checks (up to 15 total):
MANDATORY (7 - all must pass):
  1. Detection confidence (min 0.85)
  2. Landmark geometric quality (min 0.65)
  3. Skin tone validation (HSV)
  4. DCT frequency analysis (min 0.02)
  5. Glare detection
  6. LBP texture variance (min 300)
  7. Edge density + uniformity

OPTIONAL (8 - allow 3 failures):
  0. ML Anti-Spoof (Silent-Face CNN ensemble)
  8. Camera noise pattern
  9. Color channel correlation
  10. Sharpness
  11. Color distribution
  12. Face size ratio
  13. Embedding norm
  14. Gradient smoothness (AI detection)

Returns full check-by-check breakdown in the response.

response.name: Live Face Detected
Spoof Detected (Cartoon/AI)

request.description:
Multi-frame active liveness detection. Submit 3-5 sequential face images taken at slightly different angles.

Each frame runs all passive liveness checks (ML anti-spoof + heuristics), then 5 inter-frame active checks:
1. Identity consistency (same person across all frames)
2. Landmark displacement (facial features move between frames)
3. Head pose variation (head angle changes naturally)
4. Optical flow (pixel-level motion between frames)
5. Bounding box shift (natural micro-sway)

A static image (cartoon, AI-generated, printed photo, screen replay) cannot produce genuine inter-frame motion and will be rejected.

response.name: Multi-Frame Liveness Passed

item.description: Liveness detection endpoints. Single-frame uses ML anti-spoof + heuristics. Multi-frame adds inter-frame motion analysis.

item.name: Deduplicate

query.description: Similarity threshold for duplicate detection (0-1). Uses server default if omitted.

request.description: Run a full deduplication pass on all enrolled records. Scans every record and finds pairs exceeding the similarity threshold. This operation can be slow for large datasets.

item.description: Bulk deduplication across all enrolled face records.

item.name: Records

variable.description: UUID of the face record to retrieve

request.description: Retrieve a specific face record by its UUID.

variable.description: UUID of the face record to delete

request.description: Delete a face record and its associated image file by UUID.

item.description: Retrieve and manage individual face records.
